theme_identity.archetype: 1 (Organic & Earthy) infused with Warm Turkish Lokanta
theme_identity.core_vibe: Warm, inviting, amber/saffron/terracotta/cream, subtle çini tile motifs. Authentic restaurant atmosphere, slightly sophisticated but playful for 11-12 year olds.

headings.usage: H1, H2, Scene Titles, Character Names. Use tight tracking (tracking-tight).

body.usage: Dialogues, Rule descriptions, Menu items. Handles Turkish diacritics elegantly.

monospace.usage: Score trackers, numbers in the Dashboard.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use p-8 to p-12 generously for bento grids and cards. Avoid cramped spaces. For nested elements with borders, use at least p-6 padding inside.

grids.game_scenes: Asymmetric layouts. Mobile-first grid-cols-1, md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. E.g., speech bubble takes col-span-8, character image takes col-span-4.
grids.dashboard: Control Room grid. Tight gaps (gap-4/gap-6). Every pixel utilized, grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4.

waiter_speech_bubble.classes: bg-[#FFFDF7] border-2 border-[#D68C45] rounded-[32px] rounded-tl-none shadow-[4px_4px_12px_rgba(214,140,69,0.15)] p-6 md:p-8 relative
waiter_speech_bubble.details: Parchment feel. Use inline styling or before/after elements to give it a slight organic wobble or decorative ornate border.
waiter_speech_bubble.highlighted_word: font-bold border-b-2 px-1 rounded-sm cursor-pointer transition-colors

recipe_card.classes: bg-[#FDFBF7] border border-[#E8DCC4] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#D68C45] rounded-md p-6 relative overflow-hidden
recipe_card.details: Rule box that appears post-exercise. Add a faint top border line in #C44900 (red) to mimic old recipe index cards.

menu_card.classes: bg-[#3E2723] text-[#F9F6F0] rounded-lg p-6 shadow-2xl border-[3px] border-[#D4AF37]
menu_card.details: Leather-bound aesthetic. Inside content area should be `bg-[#F9F6F0] text-[#2A2421]` for readability.

receipt_score_badge.classes: bg-white border-t-4 border-dashed border-[#D7CCC8] shadow-sm px-4 py-6 text-center font-mono text-sm
receipt_score_badge.details: Use a zigzag/jagged bottom edge (can use clip-path or background-image radial-gradient technique).

buttons.primary: bg-[#C44900] hover:bg-[#A33D00] text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-serif text-xl shadow-lg transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 active:translate-y-0
buttons.audio: bg-[#F9F6F0] text-[#D68C45] hover:bg-[#D68C45] hover:text-white p-3 rounded-full border border-[#D68C45] transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D68C45] focus:ring-offset-2

animations.steam: Float up, slight sway left-right, fade out. Custom CSS keyframes needed.
animations.object_glow: drop-shadow(0 0 15px currentColor) pulse animation for Demonstrative (İşaret) adjectives indicating distance (bu/şu/o).

images.description: Cozy indoor view of a Turkish restaurant. Use as blurred background with black/40 or #3E2723/60 overlay to make text pop.
Traditional Turkish tile pattern. Use as a highly transparent overlay (opacity 0.05 to 0.1) on the main app background or dashboard areas.

icons.usage: Use for volume/audio, close buttons, checkmarks, arrows.

specific_scene_guidelines.landing: Warm welcome screen. Name input should look like a reservation book (Input field without generic borders, maybe underlined or with a subtle beige background).
specific_scene_guidelines.scene_1: Greeting dialogue. Waiter speech bubble dominates. Text includes descriptive adjectives (Niteleme). User clicks words to highlight them. Words map to #C44900 (Terracotta) on hover/active.
specific_scene_guidelines.scene_2: Table seating. 3 tables at different depths (near, mid, far). When 'bu' (near), 'şu' (mid), 'o' (far) are used, the corresponding table/plate emits a warm amber glow.
specific_scene_guidelines.scene_3: Menu card displaying numbers. 4 colored sticky-notes/cards corresponding to subtypes (asıl, sıra, üleştirme, kesir). Color code them harmoniously using greens/amber/red/blue from the adjective_types palette.
specific_scene_guidelines.dashboard: Teacher view. 'Control room' style grid. Dark header matching menu leather (#3E2723 text-[#F9F6F0]), table rows in cream and white alternating. High contrast for readability.

testing.instructions: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case. Examples: data-testid='start-game-button', data-testid='adjective-word', data-testid='audio-play-button', data-testid='student-score', data-testid='teacher-dashboard-link'.
